nodes.name: REFERENCE.md
nodes.summary: Index page for the vendored Mediabunny skill reference bundled with the remotion-best-practices Claude Code skill; links out to the three task-specific how-to docs for getting audio duration, video dimensions, and video duration with the Mediabunny library.
nodes.languageNotes: Not versus-engine project documentation — this is third-party reference material bundled inside a vendored Claude Code agent skill (.agents/skills/remotion-best-practices), used to inform agent behavior when working with the Mediabunny multimedia library, not part of the app's own architecture.

nodes.name: get-audio-duration.md
nodes.summary: Vendored third-party reference doc explaining how to get an audio file's duration in seconds using Mediabunny, with usage examples for staticFile in Remotion and for Node.js/Bun.
nodes.languageNotes: Bundled skill documentation, not versus-engine source; describes Mediabunny API usage patterns (e.g. computing duration from an audio track) for agent reference only.

nodes.name: get-video-dimensions.md
nodes.summary: Vendored third-party reference doc explaining how to get a video file's width and height using Mediabunny, covering usage with local files and with staticFile in Remotion.
nodes.languageNotes: Bundled skill documentation, not versus-engine source; describes Mediabunny API usage patterns for reading video track dimensions for agent reference only.

nodes.name: get-video-duration.md
nodes.summary: Vendored third-party reference doc explaining how to get a video file's duration in seconds using Mediabunny, with usage examples for files in the public/ directory and for Node.js/Bun.
nodes.languageNotes: Bundled skill documentation, not versus-engine source; describes Mediabunny API usage patterns for computing video duration for agent reference only.
